# Generated by bin/check_api_compat.sh. Run UPDATE_API=1 make api-check after intentional public API changes.

# Detail: function signatures, exported type definitions, exported struct fields, interface methods, and method sets.

github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer
  const ErrCodeInternal ErrCode = "GK_INTERNAL"
  const ErrCodeInvalidInput ErrCode = "GK_INVALID_INPUT"
  const ErrCodeNotFound ErrCode = "GK_NOT_FOUND"
  const ErrCodeTimeout ErrCode = "GK_TIMEOUT"
  const ErrCodeUnsupported ErrCode = "GK_UNSUPPORTED"
  func CodeOf(err error) (ErrCode, bool)
  func Errorf(code ErrCode, format string, args ...any) *Error
  func NewError(code ErrCode, message string) *Error
  func WrapError(code ErrCode, message string, cause error) *Error
  method (*Error) Error() string
  method (*Error) ErrorCode() ErrCode
  method (*Error) Is(target error) bool
  method (*Error) Unwrap() error
  method (CodeCarrier) ErrorCode() ErrCode
  method (ErrCode) Error() string
  type CodeCarrier interface{ ErrorCode() ErrCode }
  type ErrCode string
  type Error struct{ Cause error; Code ErrCode; Message string }

  method (github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/cache.NoCache[K, V]) Clear()
  method (github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/cache.NoCache[K, V]) ContainsKey(key K) bool
  method (github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/cache.NoCache[K, V]) Get(key K) (V, bool)
  method (github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/cache.NoCache[K, V]) GetOrLoad(key K, supplier github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/cache.Supplier[V]) (V, error)
  method (github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/cache.NoCache[K, V]) GetOrLoadWith(key K, _ bool, _ time.Duration, supplier github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/cache.Supplier[V]) (V, error)
  method (github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/cache.NoCache[K, V]) GetWithUpdate(key K, _ bool) (V, bool)
  method (github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/cache.NoCache[K, V]) HitCount() int64
  method (github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/cache.NoCache[K, V]) IsEmpty() bool
  method (github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/cache.NoCache[K, V]) IsFull() bool
  method (github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/cache.NoCache[K, V]) Keys() []K
  method (github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/cache.NoCache[K, V]) MissCount() int64
  method (github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/cache.NoCache[K, V]) Prune() int
  method (github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/cache.NoCache[K, V]) Put(key K, value V)
  method (github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/cache.NoCache[K, V]) PutWithTimeout(key K, value V, timeout time.Duration)
  method (github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/cache.NoCache[K, V]) Remove(key K)
  method (github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/cache.NoCache[K, V]) SetListener(_ github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/cache.CacheListener[K, V]) github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/cache.Cache[K, V]
  method (github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/cache.NoCache[K, V]) Size() int
  method (github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/cache.NoCache[K, V]) Timeout() time.Duration
  method (github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/cache.NoCache[K, V]) Values() []V
  type CacheListenerFunc[K comparable, V any] func(key K, value V)
  type CacheListener[K comparable, V any] interface{ OnRemove(key K, value V) }
  type CacheObj[K comparable, V any] struct{ *github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/cache.CacheObj[K, V] *github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/cache.CacheObj[K, V] }
  type Cache[K comparable, V any] interface{ Capacity() int; Clear(); ContainsKey(key K) bool; Get(key K) (V, bool); GetOrLoad(key K, supplier github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/cache.Supplier[V]) (V, error); GetOrLoadWith(key K, updateLastAccess bool, timeout time.Duration, supplier github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/cache.Supplier[V]) (V, error); GetWithUpdate(key K, updateLastAccess bool) (V, bool); HitCount() int64; IsEmpty() bool; IsFull() bool; Keys() []K; MissCount() int64; Prune() int; Put(key K, value V); PutWithTimeout(key K, value V, timeout time.Duration); Remove(key K); SetListener(listener github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/cache.CacheListener[K, V]) github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/cache.Cache[K, V]; Size() int; Timeout() time.Duration; Values() []V }
  type FIFOCache[K comparable, V any] struct{ *github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/cache.FIFOCache[K, V] *github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/cache.FIFOCache[K, V] }
  type LFUCache[K comparable, V any] struct{ *github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/cache.LFUCache[K, V] *github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/cache.LFUCache[K, V] }
  type LRUCache[K comparable, V any] struct{ *github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/cache.LRUCache[K, V] *github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/cache.LRUCache[K, V] }
  type NoCache[K comparable, V any] struct{ *github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/cache.NoCache[K, V] *github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/cache.NoCache[K, V] }
  type Option[K comparable, V any] = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/cache.Option[K, V]
  type Supplier[V any] func() (V, error)
  type Ticker = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/cache.Ticker
  type TickerFactory = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/cache.TickerFactory
  type TimedCache[K comparable, V any] struct{ *github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/cache.TimedCache[K, V] *github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/cache.TimedCache[K, V] }
  type WeakCache[K comparable, V any] struct{ *github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/cache.WeakCache[K, V] *github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/cache.WeakCache[K, V] }

  func Base64Decode(s string) ([]byte, error)
  func Base64DecodeStr(s string) (string, error)
  func Base64DecodeWithEncoding(s string, enc *encoding/base64.Encoding) ([]byte, error)
  func Base64Encode(data []byte) string
  func Base64EncodeStr(s string) string
  func Base64EncodeWithEncoding(data []byte, enc *encoding/base64.Encoding) string
  func Base64RawURLDecode(s string) ([]byte, error)
  func Base64RawURLEncode(data []byte) string
  func Base64URLDecode(s string) ([]byte, error)
  func Base64URLEncode(data []byte) string
  func HexDecode(s string) ([]byte, error)
  func HexDecodeStr(s string) (string, error)
  func HexEncode(data []byte) string
  func HexEncodeStr(s string) string
  type Error = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/codec.CodecError

github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/vconf
  const DefaultMaxBytes int64 = 16777216
  const TypeBool untyped string = "bool"
  const TypeFloat untyped string = "float"
  const TypeInt untyped string = "int"
  const TypeList untyped string = "list"
  const TypeString untyped string = "string"
  func Base64Decrypt(cipherText string) (string, error)
  func Load(path string) (*Conf, error)
  func LoadFiles(paths ...string) (*Conf, error)
  func LoadFilesWithOptions(opts LoadOptions, paths ...string) (*Conf, error)
  func LoadProfile(path string, profile string) (*Conf, error)
  func LoadProfileWithOptions(path string, profile string, opts LoadOptions) (*Conf, error)
  func LoadRemote(rawURL string) (*Conf, error)
  func LoadRemoteSafe(rawURL string) (*Conf, error)
  func LoadRemoteSafeWithOptions(rawURL string, opts LoadOptions) (*Conf, error)
  func LoadRemoteWithOptions(rawURL string, opts LoadOptions) (*Conf, error)
  func LoadWithOptions(path string, opts LoadOptions) (*Conf, error)
  func Merge(configs ...*Conf) *Conf
  func New() *Conf
  func Parse(content string) (*Conf, error)
  func ParseByExt(path string, content []byte) (*Conf, error)
  func ParseByExtWithOptions(path string, content []byte, opts ...ParseOption) (*Conf, error)
  func ParseBytes(content []byte) (*Conf, error)
  func ParseTOML(content string) (*Conf, error)
  func ParseTOMLWithOptions(content string, opts ...ParseOption) (*Conf, error)
  func ParseYAML(content string) (*Conf, error)
  func ParseYAMLFull(content string) (*Conf, error)
  func ParseYAMLFullWithOptions(content string, opts ...ParseOption) (*Conf, error)
  func SchemaFromStruct(dst any) (Schema, error)
  func Watch(path string, interval time.Duration, onChange func(*Conf, error)) (func(), error)
  func WatchWithOptions(path string, opts WatchOptions, onChange func(*Conf, error)) (func(), error)
  func WithBindBoolParser(parser func(string) (bool, error)) BindOption
  func WithBindFloatParser(parser func(string, int) (float64, error)) BindOption
  func WithBindIntParser(parser func(string, int, int) (int64, error)) BindOption
  func WithBindUintParser(parser func(string, int, int) (uint64, error)) BindOption
  func WithBoolParser(parser func(string) (bool, error)) ValueOption
  func WithEnvLookup(lookup func(string) string) ExpandOption
  func WithIntParser(parser func(string) (int, error)) ValueOption
  func WithParserForExt(ext string, parser func([]byte) (*Conf, error)) ParseOption
  func WithSchemaBoolParser(parser func(string) (bool, error)) SchemaOption
  func WithSchemaFloatParser(parser func(string, int) (float64, error)) SchemaOption
  func WithSchemaIntParser(parser func(string, int, int) (int64, error)) SchemaOption
  func WithTOMLUnmarshalFunc(unmarshal func([]byte, any) error) ParseOption
  func WithYAMLUnmarshalFunc(unmarshal func([]byte, any) error) ParseOption
  type BindOption = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/conf.BindOption
  type Conf = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/conf.Conf
  type DecryptFunc = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/conf.DecryptFunc
  type Error = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/conf.ConfError
  type ExpandOption = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/conf.ExpandOption
  type FieldRule = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/conf.FieldRule
  type LoadOptions = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/conf.LoadOptions
  type ParseOption = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/conf.ParseOption
  type Schema = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/conf.Schema
  type SchemaOption = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/conf.SchemaOption
  type ValueOption = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/conf.ValueOption
  type WatchEvent = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/conf.WatchEvent
  type WatchOptions = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/conf.WatchOptions
  type WatchTicker = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/conf.WatchTicker
  type WatchTickerFactory = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/conf.WatchTickerFactory

  func ToBoolDefault(v any, def bool) bool
  func ToBoolDefaultWithOptions(v any, def bool, opts ...Option) bool
  func ToBoolWithOptions(v any, opts ...Option) bool
  func ToBytes(v any) []byte
  func ToBytesWithOptions(v any, opts ...Option) []byte
  func ToFloat64(v any) float64
  func ToFloat64Default(v any, def float64) float64
  func ToFloat64DefaultWithOptions(v any, def float64, opts ...Option) float64
  func ToFloat64WithOptions(v any, opts ...Option) float64
  func ToInt(v any) int
  func ToInt64(v any) int64
  func ToInt64Default(v any, def int64) int64
  func ToInt64DefaultWithOptions(v any, def int64, opts ...Option) int64
  func ToInt64WithOptions(v any, opts ...Option) int64
  func ToIntDefault(v any, def int) int
  func ToIntDefaultWithOptions(v any, def int, opts ...Option) int
  func ToIntWithOptions(v any, opts ...Option) int
  func ToString(v any) string
  func ToStringDefault(v any, def string) string
  func ToStringDefaultWithOptions(v any, def string, opts ...Option) string
  func ToStringWithOptions(v any, opts ...Option) string
  func WithBoolParser(parser func(string) (bool, error)) Option
  func WithFormatBoolFunc(formatter func(bool) string) Option
  func WithFormatFloatFunc(formatter func(float64, byte, int, int) string) Option
  func WithParseFloatFunc(parser func(string, int) (float64, error)) Option
  func WithParseIntFunc(parser func(string, int, int) (int64, error)) Option
  type Option = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/conv.Option

github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/vcron
  const PartDayOfMonth Part = 3
  const PartDayOfWeek Part = 5
  const PartHour Part = 2
  const PartMinute Part = 1
  const PartMonth Part = 4
  const PartSecond Part = 0
  const PartYear Part = 6
  func ConfigureDefaultScheduler(opts ...SchedulerOption) *Scheduler
  func CronLaunchingCount() int
  func CronRemove(id string) bool
  func CronRemoveWithOptions(id string, opts ...DefaultSchedulerOption) bool
  func CronRestart() error
  func CronRestartWithOptions(opts ...DefaultSchedulerOption) error

  func CronScheduleFuncWithOptions(pattern string, fn func(), opts ...DefaultSchedulerOption) (string, error)

  func CronSetMatchSecondE(b bool) error
  func CronSetMatchSecondEWithOptions(b bool, opts ...DefaultSchedulerOption) error
  func CronSetMatchSecondWithOptions(b bool, opts ...DefaultSchedulerOption)

  func CronShutdownWithOptions(ctx context.Context, opts ...DefaultSchedulerOption) error
  func CronStart() error
  func CronStartWithOptions(opts ...DefaultSchedulerOption) error
  func CronStop()
  func CronStopWithOptions(opts ...DefaultSchedulerOption)
  func CronUpdatePattern(id string, pattern string) error
  func CronUpdatePatternWithOptions(id string, pattern string, opts ...DefaultSchedulerOption) error
  func DefaultScheduler() *Scheduler
  func DefaultSchedulerWithOptions(opts ...DefaultSchedulerOption) *Scheduler
  func MustNewPattern(expr string) *Pattern

  func NewConfigWithOptions(opts ...ConfigOption) *Config

  func WithSchedulerPatternOptions(opts ...PatternOption) SchedulerOption
  func WithSleeper(sleeper func(time.Duration, <-chan struct{}) bool) SchedulerOption

  type Config = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/cron.Config
  type ConfigOption = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/cron.ConfigOption
  type CronError = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/cron.CronError
  type CronTask = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/cron.CronTask

  type Part = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/cron.Part

  type SchedulerOption = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/cron.SchedulerOption
  type SimpleTaskListener = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/cron.SimpleTaskListener

  type TaskListener = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/cron.TaskListener
  type TaskTable = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/cron.TaskTable
  var AlwaysTrueMatcher PartMatcher
  var ErrSchedulerStarted error

github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/vcrypto
  func AESDecryptGCM(cipherText []byte, key []byte, nonce []byte, additionalData []byte) ([]byte, error)
  func AESDecryptGCMWithOptions(cipherText []byte, key []byte, nonce []byte, additionalData []byte, opts ...AESGCMOption) ([]byte, error)
  func AESEncryptGCM(plain []byte, key []byte, nonce []byte, additionalData []byte) ([]byte, error)
  func AESEncryptGCMWithOptions(plain []byte, key []byte, nonce []byte, additionalData []byte, opts ...AESGCMOption) ([]byte, error)
  func AESOpenGCM(cipherText []byte, key []byte, nonce []byte, additionalData []byte) ([]byte, error)
  func AESOpenGCMWithOptions(cipherText []byte, key []byte, nonce []byte, additionalData []byte, opts ...AESGCMOption) ([]byte, error)
  func AESSealGCM(plain []byte, key []byte, additionalData []byte) (nonce []byte, cipherText []byte, err error)
  func AESSealGCMWithOptions(plain []byte, key []byte, additionalData []byte, opts ...AESGCMOption) (nonce []byte, cipherText []byte, err error)
  func ConstantTimeEqual(a []byte, b []byte) bool
  func Digest(data []byte, newHash func() hash.Hash) []byte
  func DigestHex(data []byte, newHash func() hash.Hash) string
  func GenAESKey(size int) ([]byte, error)
  func GenAESKeyWithOptions(size int, opts ...RandomOption) ([]byte, error)
  func GenRSAKey(bits int) (*crypto/rsa.PrivateKey, error)
  func GenRSAKeyWithOptions(bits int, opts ...RSAOption) (*crypto/rsa.PrivateKey, error)
  func HMACBytes(fn func() hash.Hash, key []byte, data []byte) []byte
  func HMACEqual(a []byte, b []byte) bool
  func HMACHex(fn func() hash.Hash, key []byte, data []byte) string
  func HMACSHA256Hex(key []byte, data []byte) string
  func HMACSHA384Hex(key []byte, data []byte) string
  func HMACSHA512Hex(key []byte, data []byte) string

  func PBKDF2SHA256(password []byte, salt []byte, iterations int, keyLen int) ([]byte, error)
  func ParseRSAPrivateKeyPEM(data []byte) (*crypto/rsa.PrivateKey, error)
  func ParseRSAPublicKeyPEM(data []byte) (*crypto/rsa.PublicKey, error)
  func ParseX509CertificatePEM(data []byte) (*crypto/x509.Certificate, error)
  func PrivateKeyToPEM(priv *crypto/rsa.PrivateKey) []byte
  func PrivateKeyToPKCS8PEM(priv *crypto/rsa.PrivateKey) ([]byte, error)
  func PublicKeyFromCertificatePEM(data []byte) (*crypto/rsa.PublicKey, error)
  func PublicKeyToPEM(pub *crypto/rsa.PublicKey) ([]byte, error)
  func PublicKeyToPKCS1PEM(pub *crypto/rsa.PublicKey) []byte
  func RSADecryptOAEP(cipherText []byte, priv *crypto/rsa.PrivateKey, label []byte) ([]byte, error)
  func RSADecryptOAEPWithOptions(cipherText []byte, priv *crypto/rsa.PrivateKey, label []byte, opts ...RSAOption) ([]byte, error)
  func RSAEncryptOAEP(plain []byte, pub *crypto/rsa.PublicKey, label []byte) ([]byte, error)
  func RSAEncryptOAEPWithOptions(plain []byte, pub *crypto/rsa.PublicKey, label []byte, opts ...RSAOption) ([]byte, error)
  func RSASignPSS(priv *crypto/rsa.PrivateKey, hash crypto.Hash, digest []byte) ([]byte, error)
  func RSASignPSSWithOptions(priv *crypto/rsa.PrivateKey, hash crypto.Hash, digest []byte, opts ...RSAOption) ([]byte, error)
  func RSAVerifyPSS(pub *crypto/rsa.PublicKey, hash crypto.Hash, digest []byte, sig []byte) error
  func RSAVerifyPSSWithOptions(pub *crypto/rsa.PublicKey, hash crypto.Hash, digest []byte, sig []byte, opts ...RSAOption) error
  func RandomBytes(n int) ([]byte, error)
  func RandomBytesWithOptions(n int, opts ...RandomOption) ([]byte, error)
  func SHA224(data []byte) []byte
  func SHA224Hex(data []byte) string
  func SHA256(data []byte) []byte
  func SHA256Hex(s string) string
  func SHA256HexBytes(data []byte) string
  func SHA384(data []byte) []byte
  func SHA384Hex(data []byte) string
  func SHA512(data []byte) []byte
  func SHA512Hex(s string) string
  func SHA512HexBytes(data []byte) string
  func SignParams(params map[string]any, digestHex func([]byte) string, separator string, keyValueSeparator string, ignoreNil bool, otherParams ...string) string
  func SignParamsSHA256(params map[string]any, otherParams ...string) string
  func SignSHA256WithRSA(data []byte, priv *crypto/rsa.PrivateKey) ([]byte, error)
  func SignWithRSAOptions(data []byte, priv *crypto/rsa.PrivateKey, opts ...RSADigestOption) ([]byte, error)
  func ValidateAESGCMNonce(nonce []byte) error
  func ValidateAESIV(iv []byte) error
  func ValidateAESKey(key []byte) error
  func VerifySHA256WithRSA(data []byte, sig []byte, pub *crypto/rsa.PublicKey) error
  func VerifyWithRSAOptions(data []byte, sig []byte, pub *crypto/rsa.PublicKey, opts ...RSADigestOption) error
  func WithGCMBlockFactory(factory func([]byte) (crypto/cipher.Block, error)) AESGCMOption
  func WithGCMNonceSize(size int) AESGCMOption
  func WithGCMRandomOptions(opts ...RandomOption) AESGCMOption
  func WithGCMTagSize(size int) AESGCMOption
  func WithRSADigestHash(hashID crypto.Hash, newHash func() hash.Hash) RSADigestOption
  func WithRSADigestPSS(opts *crypto/rsa.PSSOptions) RSADigestOption
  func WithRSADigestRandomReader(reader io.Reader) RSADigestOption
  func WithRSAOAEPHash(newHash func() hash.Hash) RSAOption
  func WithRSAPSSOptions(opts *crypto/rsa.PSSOptions) RSAOption
  func WithRSARandomReader(reader io.Reader) RSAOption
  func WithRandomReader(reader io.Reader) RandomOption
  type AESGCMOption = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/crypto.AESGCMOption
  type RSADigestOption = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/crypto.RSADigestOption
  type RSAOption = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/crypto.RSAOption
  type RandomOption = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/crypto.RandomOption
  var ErrInvalidCipherText error
  var ErrInvalidIV error
  var ErrInvalidKey error

github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/vcsv
  func ForEach(r io.Reader, handle func([]string) error, opts ...ReadOption) error
  func MapsToRecords(headers []string, rows []map[string]string) [][]string
  func Read(r io.Reader, opts ...ReadOption) ([][]string, error)
  func ReadMaps(r io.Reader, opts ...ReadOption) ([]map[string]string, error)
  func ReadString(s string, opts ...ReadOption) ([][]string, error)
  func ReadStringMaps(s string, opts ...ReadOption) ([]map[string]string, error)
  func RecordsToMaps(records [][]string) ([]map[string]string, error)
  func StructsToRecords(values any) ([][]string, error)
  func WithComma(comma rune) Option
  func WithComment(comment rune) ReadOption
  func WithFieldsPerRecord(n int) ReadOption
  func WithLazyQuotes(enabled bool) ReadOption
  func WithReuseRecord(enabled bool) ReadOption
  func WithTrimLeadingSpace(enabled bool) ReadOption
  func WithTrimUTF8BOM(enabled bool) ReadOption
  func WithUTF8BOM(enabled bool) WriteOption
  func WithUseCRLF(enabled bool) WriteOption
  func Write(w io.Writer, records [][]string, opts ...WriteOption) error
  func WriteMaps(w io.Writer, headers []string, rows []map[string]string, opts ...WriteOption) error
  func WriteString(records [][]string, opts ...WriteOption) (string, error)
  func WriteStringMaps(headers []string, rows []map[string]string, opts ...WriteOption) (string, error)
  func WriteStringStructs(values any, opts ...WriteOption) (string, error)
  func WriteStructs(w io.Writer, values any, opts ...WriteOption) error
  type Error = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/csvx.CSVError
  type Option = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/csvx.Option
  type ReadOption = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/csvx.ReadOption
  type WriteOption = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/csvx.WriteOption

github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/vdate
  const HTTPPattern untyped string = "Mon, 02 Jan 2006 15:04:05 MST"
  const NormDatePattern untyped string = "2006-01-02"
  const NormDatetimePattern untyped string = "2006-01-02 15:04:05"
  const NormPattern untyped string = "2006-01-02 15:04:05"
  const NormTimePattern untyped string = "15:04:05"
  const PureDatePattern untyped string = "20060102"
  const PureDatetimePattern untyped string = "20060102150405"
  const UTCPattern untyped string = "2006-01-02T15:04:05Z"
  func BeginOfDay(t time.Time) time.Time
  func BeginOfMonth(t time.Time) time.Time
  func BeginOfYear(t time.Time) time.Time
  func BetweenDays(a time.Time, b time.Time) int
  func EndOfDay(t time.Time) time.Time
  func EndOfMonth(t time.Time) time.Time
  func EndOfYear(t time.Time) time.Time
  func Format(t time.Time, layout string) string
  func FormatDateOnly(t time.Time) string
  func FormatNorm(t time.Time) string
  func FormatTimeOnly(t time.Time) string
  func IsSameDay(a time.Time, b time.Time) bool
  func Now() time.Time
  func NowWithOptions(opts ...NowOption) time.Time
  func OffsetDay(t time.Time, days int) time.Time
  func OffsetHour(t time.Time, hours int) time.Time
  func OffsetMinute(t time.Time, minutes int) time.Time
  func OffsetMonth(t time.Time, months int) time.Time
  func OffsetSecond(t time.Time, seconds int) time.Time
  func OffsetYear(t time.Time, years int) time.Time
  func Parse(s string) (time.Time, error)
  func ParseLayout(s string, layout string) (time.Time, error)
  func ParseLayoutWithOptions(s string, layout string, opts ...ParseOption) (time.Time, error)
  func ParseWithOptions(s string, opts ...ParseOption) (time.Time, error)
  func Today() time.Time
  func TodayWithOptions(opts ...NowOption) time.Time
  func WithClock(clock func() time.Time) NowOption
  func WithLocation(location *time.Location) ParseOption
  func WithParseInLocationFunc(parser func(layout string, value string, location *time.Location) (time.Time, error)) ParseOption
  type Error = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/date.DateError
  type NowOption = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/date.NowOption
  type ParseOption = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/date.ParseOption

github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/vdb
  const And github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/db.LogicalOperator = "AND"
  const AscDirection github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/db.Direction = "ASC"
  const DescDirection github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/db.Direction = "DESC"
  const DialectClickHouse github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/db.Dialect = "clickhouse"
  const DialectMySQL github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/db.Dialect = "mysql"
  const DialectOracle github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/db.Dialect = "oracle"
  const DialectPostgres github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/db.Dialect = "postgres"
  const DialectQuestion github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/db.Dialect = "question"
  const DialectSQLServer github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/db.Dialect = "sqlserver"
  const DialectSQLite github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/db.Dialect = "sqlite"
  const DialectUnknown github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/db.Dialect = ""
  const Or github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/db.LogicalOperator = "OR"
  func AndGroup(conds ...Condition) Condition
  func Asc(field string) Order
  func AssignEntity(entity Entity, dst any) error
  func Between(field string, begin any, end any) Condition
  func BuildConditions(conds ...Condition) (string, []any, error)
  func BuildLikeValue(value any, mode string) string
  func ConditionsFromEntity(e Entity) []Condition
  func Delete(table string) *SQLBuilder
  func Desc(field string) Order
  func EntityFromMap(table string, values map[string]any) Entity
  func Eq(field string, value any) Condition
  func Exec(ctx context.Context, db *DB, query string, args ...any) (database/sql.Result, error)
  func Gt(field string, value any) Condition
  func Gte(field string, value any) Condition
  func In(field string, values ...any) Condition
  func Insert(e Entity) *SQLBuilder
  func IsInClause(sql string) bool
  func IsNotNull(field string) Condition
  func IsNull(field string) Condition
  func Like(field string, value any) Condition
  func Lt(field string, value any) Condition
  func Lte(field string, value any) Condition
  func Ne(field string, value any) Condition
  func NewBuilder(opts ...Option) *SQLBuilder
  func NewEntity(table string) Entity
  func NewOptions() Options
  func NewPage(number int, size int, orders ...Order) Page
  func NewPageResult[T any](page Page, total int64, items []T) PageResult[T]
  func NewQuery(tables ...string) Query
  func NewWrapper(prefix string, suffix string) Wrapper
  func NormalizeDialect(name string) Dialect
  func Open(driverName string, dataSourceName string, opts ...Option) (*DB, error)
  func OrGroup(conds ...Condition) Condition
  func OrWith(c Condition) Condition
  func ParseNamed(query string, args map[string]any, dialect Dialect) (NamedSQL, error)
  func Raw(sql string, args ...any) *SQLBuilder
  func RemoveOuterOrderBy(sql string) string
  func ScanOne(rows *database/sql.Rows) (Entity, bool, error)
  func ScanRows(rows *database/sql.Rows) ([]Entity, error)
  func Select(fields ...string) *SQLBuilder
  func Update(e Entity) *SQLBuilder
  func Use(sqlDB *database/sql.DB, opts ...Option) *DB
  func WithConnMaxIdleTime(d time.Duration) Option
  func WithConnMaxLifetime(d time.Duration) Option
  func WithDialect(d Dialect) Option

  func WithMaxOpenConns(n int) Option
  func WithSQLOpenFunc(open SQLOpenFunc) Option
  func WithWrapper(w Wrapper) Option
  func WrapperForDialect(d Dialect) Wrapper
  type Column = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/db.Column
  type Condition = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/db.Condition

  type DBError = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/db.DBError
  type Dialect = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/db.Dialect

  type SQLBuilder = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/db.SQLBuilder

  func FilterMode(text string, greedMatch bool, processor Processor) string

  func FilterWithOptions(text string, opts ...MatcherOption) string

  func GetFoundAllAny(value any) []FoundWord
  func GetFoundAllAnyWithOptions(value any, opts ...MatcherOption) []FoundWord

  func IsStopChar(r rune) bool

  func WithJSONUnmarshal(unmarshal func([]byte, any) error) MatcherOption

  func WithMatcherWords(words []string, opts ...WordTreeOption) MatcherOption

  const ContentTypeEventStream ContentType = "text/event-stream"
  const ContentTypeFormURLEncoded ContentType = "application/x-www-form-urlencoded"
  const ContentTypeJSON ContentType = "application/json"
  const ContentTypeMultipart ContentType = "multipart/form-data"
  const ContentTypeOctetStream ContentType = "application/octet-stream"
  const ContentTypeTextHTML ContentType = "text/html"
  const ContentTypeTextPlain ContentType = "text/plain"
  const ContentTypeTextXML ContentType = "text/xml"
  const ContentTypeXML ContentType = "application/xml"
  const HeaderAccept Header = "Accept"
  const HeaderAcceptCharset Header = "Accept-Charset"
  const HeaderAcceptEncoding Header = "Accept-Encoding"
  const HeaderAcceptLanguage Header = "Accept-Language"
  const HeaderAuthorization Header = "Authorization"
  const HeaderCacheControl Header = "Cache-Control"
  const HeaderConnection Header = "Connection"
  const HeaderContentDisposition Header = "Content-Disposition"
  const HeaderContentEncoding Header = "Content-Encoding"
  const HeaderContentLength Header = "Content-Length"
  const HeaderContentType Header = "Content-Type"
  const HeaderCookie Header = "Cookie"
  const HeaderDate Header = "Date"
  const HeaderETag Header = "ETag"
  const HeaderHost Header = "Host"
  const HeaderLocation Header = "Location"
  const HeaderMimeVersion Header = "MIME-Version"
  const HeaderOrigin Header = "Origin"
  const HeaderPragma Header = "Pragma"
  const HeaderProxyAuthorization Header = "Proxy-Authorization"
  const HeaderReferer Header = "Referer"
  const HeaderSetCookie Header = "Set-Cookie"
  const HeaderTrailer Header = "Trailer"
  const HeaderTransferEncoding Header = "Transfer-Encoding"
  const HeaderUpgrade Header = "Upgrade"
  const HeaderUserAgent Header = "User-Agent"
  const HeaderVia Header = "Via"
  const HeaderWWWAuthenticate Header = "WWW-Authenticate"

  const MethodOptions Method = "OPTIONS"
  const MethodPatch Method = "PATCH"
  const MethodPost Method = "POST"
  const MethodPut Method = "PUT"
  const MethodTrace Method = "TRACE"

  func GetGlobalMaxResponseBytes() int64
  func GetGlobalTimeout() time.Duration
  func GetGlobalUserAgent() string

  const GenderMale Gender = 1
  const GenderUnknown Gender = -1

  const BarcodeFormatAztec github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/imgx.BarcodeFormat = 1
  const BarcodeFormatCodabar github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/imgx.BarcodeFormat = 2
  const BarcodeFormatCode128 github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/imgx.BarcodeFormat = 5
  const BarcodeFormatCode39 github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/imgx.BarcodeFormat = 3
  const BarcodeFormatCode93 github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/imgx.BarcodeFormat = 4
  const BarcodeFormatDataMatrix github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/imgx.BarcodeFormat = 6
  const BarcodeFormatEAN13 github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/imgx.BarcodeFormat = 8
  const BarcodeFormatEAN8 github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/imgx.BarcodeFormat = 7
  const BarcodeFormatITF github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/imgx.BarcodeFormat = 9
  const BarcodeFormatMaxiCode github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/imgx.BarcodeFormat = 10
  const BarcodeFormatPDF417 github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/imgx.BarcodeFormat = 11
  const BarcodeFormatQRCode github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/imgx.BarcodeFormat = 12
  const BarcodeFormatRSS14 github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/imgx.BarcodeFormat = 13
  const BarcodeFormatRSSExpanded github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/imgx.BarcodeFormat = 14
  const BarcodeFormatUPCA github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/imgx.BarcodeFormat = 15
  const BarcodeFormatUPCE github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/imgx.BarcodeFormat = 16
  const BarcodeFormatUnknown github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/imgx.BarcodeFormat = 0
  const BarcodeOutputFormatASCII github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/imgx.BarcodeOutputFormat = 3
  const BarcodeOutputFormatBase64Data github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/imgx.BarcodeOutputFormat = 4
  const BarcodeOutputFormatPNG github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/imgx.BarcodeOutputFormat = 1
  const BarcodeOutputFormatSVG github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/imgx.BarcodeOutputFormat = 2
  const BarcodeOutputFormatUnknown github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/imgx.BarcodeOutputFormat = 0
  const QRErrorCorrectionHigh github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/imgx.QRErrorCorrectionLevel = 4
  const QRErrorCorrectionLow github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/imgx.QRErrorCorrectionLevel = 1
  const QRErrorCorrectionMedium github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/imgx.QRErrorCorrectionLevel = 2
  const QRErrorCorrectionQuartile github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/imgx.QRErrorCorrectionLevel = 3
  const QRErrorCorrectionUnknown github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/imgx.QRErrorCorrectionLevel = 0

  func WithQRCodeSize(size int) QRCodeOption
  func WithQRCodeTransparentBackground() QRCodeOption
  func WithQRCodeVersion(version int) QRCodeOption
  func WithRandomInt(randomInt func(max int) int) CaptchaOption
  func WriteBarcode(w io.Writer, content string, format BarcodeFormat, opts ...BarcodeOption) error
  func WriteQRCode(w io.Writer, content string, opts ...QRCodeOption) error
  type AbstractCaptcha = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/imgx.AbstractCaptcha
  type BarcodeFormat = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/imgx.BarcodeFormat
  type BarcodeOption = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/imgx.BarcodeOption
  type BarcodeOutputFormat = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/imgx.BarcodeOutputFormat
  type Captcha = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/imgx.ICaptcha
  type CaptchaOption = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/imgx.CaptchaOption
  type CircleCaptcha = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/imgx.CircleCaptcha
  type CodeGenerator = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/imgx.CodeGenerator
  type DecodeOption = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/imgx.DecodeOption
  type DecodeResult = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/imgx.DecodeResult
  type GeneratorOption = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/imgx.GeneratorOption
  type GifCaptcha = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/imgx.GifCaptcha
  type ICaptcha = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/imgx.ICaptcha
  type LineCaptcha = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/imgx.LineCaptcha
  type MathGenerator = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/imgx.MathGenerator
  type QRCodeOption = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/imgx.QRCodeOption
  type QRErrorCorrectionLevel = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/imgx.QRErrorCorrectionLevel
  type RandomGenerator = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/imgx.RandomGenerator
  type ShearCaptcha = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/imgx.ShearCaptcha
  type WriteOption = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/imgx.WriteOption

github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/vjob
  func NewBatchSingle[T any](run func(context.Context, T) (Merge, error), vals []T) *Batch[T]
  func NewBatch[T any](run func(context.Context, []T) (Merge, error), vals []T) *Batch[T]
  func NewMap(run any, m any) *Slice
  func NewMapE(run any, m any) (*Slice, error)
  func NewMapKeys[K comparable, V any](run func(context.Context, K) (Merge, error), m map[K]V) *Batch[K]
  func NewSlice(run func(context.Context, int, int) (Merge, error), length int) *Slice
  func NewSliceSingle(run func(context.Context, int) (Merge, error), length int) *Slice
  func Run(ctx context.Context, job Sliceable) error
  func RunWith(ctx context.Context, job Sliceable, opts Options) error
  method (*Batch[T]) JobOptions() Options
  method (*Batch[T]) Len() int
  method (*Batch[T]) Run(ctx context.Context, start int, end int) (Merge, error)
  method (*Batch[T]) WithBatchSize(size int) *Batch[T]
  method (*Batch[T]) WithMaxConcurrency(maxConcurrency int) *Batch[T]
  type Batch[T any] struct{ Options Options }
  type Merge = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/job.Merge
  type OptionCarrier = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/job.OptionCarrier
  type Options = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/job.Options
  type Slice = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/job.Slice
  type Sliceable = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/job.Sliceable
  var ErrInvalidMapJob error
  var ErrInvalidRange error
  var ErrNilJob error

  func CreateConfig() *Config
  func Format(raw string) string
  func FormatWithOptions(raw string, opts ...FormatOption) string
  func GetByPath(root any, path string) any
  func GetByPathOr(root any, path string, def any) any

  func IsArrayWithOptions(s string, opts ...ValidOption) bool
  func IsJSON(s string) bool
  func IsJSONWithOptions(s string, opts ...ValidOption) bool
  func IsNull(v any) bool
  func IsObj(s string) bool
  func IsObjWithOptions(s string, opts ...ValidOption) bool
  func NewArray() *Array
  func NewArrayWithConfig(cfg *Config) *Array
  func NewConfig() *Config
  func NewJSONError(format string, args ...any) *Error
  func NewObject() *Object
  func NewObjectWithConfig(cfg *Config) *Object

  func ParseArray(src any) (*Array, error)

  func ParseArrayWithOptions(src any, opts ...ParseOption) (*Array, error)

  func ParseWithOptions(src any, opts ...ParseOption) (any, error)
  func PutByPath(root any, path string, value any) error
  func Quote(s string) string

  func ToBeanWithOptions(src any, dst any, opts ...BeanOption) error
  func ToList(src any, dst any) error
  func ToListWithOptions(src any, dst any, opts ...BeanOption) error

  func ToPrettyStrWithConfig(v any, cfg *Config) (string, error)
  func ToStr(v any, opts ...EncodeOption) (string, error)
  func ToStrIndent(v any, indent int, opts ...EncodeOption) (string, error)
  func ToStrWithConfig(v any, cfg *Config) (string, error)
  func ToXML(root any, rootTag string) (string, error)
  func ToXMLWithOptions(root any, rootTag string, opts ...github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/xml.WriteOption) (string, error)
  func WithBeanConfig(cfg *Config) BeanOption
  func WithBeanUnmarshalFunc(unmarshal func([]byte, any) error) BeanOption
  func WithConfig(cfg *Config) EncodeOption
  func WithDateFormat(layout string) EncodeOption
  func WithDecoderFactory(factory func(io.Reader) *encoding/json.Decoder) EncodeOption

  func WithFormatIndentWidth(n int) FormatOption

  func WithIgnoreNullValue(ignore bool) EncodeOption
  func WithIndent(indent int) EncodeOption

  func WithMarshalFunc(marshal func(any) ([]byte, error)) EncodeOption
  func WithParseBoolFunc(parse func(string) (bool, error)) EncodeOption

  func WithParseDecoderFactory(factory func(io.Reader) *encoding/json.Decoder) ParseOption

  func WithParseIntFunc(parse func(string, int, int) (int64, error)) EncodeOption
  func WithParseUnmarshalFunc(unmarshal func([]byte, any) error) ParseOption
  func WithSprintFunc(sprint func(any) string) EncodeOption
  func WithUnmarshalFunc(unmarshal func([]byte, any) error) EncodeOption

  func XMLToJSON(xmlStr string) (*Object, error)
  func XMLToJSONWithOptions(xmlStr string, opts ...github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/xml.ParseOption) (*Object, error)
  type Array = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/json.JSONArray

github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/vjwt
  const JWTAlgES256 untyped string = "ES256"
  const JWTAlgES384 untyped string = "ES384"
  const JWTAlgES512 untyped string = "ES512"
  const JWTAlgHS256 untyped string = "HS256"
  const JWTAlgHS384 untyped string = "HS384"
  const JWTAlgHS512 untyped string = "HS512"
  const JWTAlgPS256 untyped string = "PS256"
  const JWTAlgPS384 untyped string = "PS384"
  const JWTAlgPS512 untyped string = "PS512"
  const JWTHeaderAlgorithm untyped string = "alg"
  const JWTHeaderContentType untyped string = "cty"
  const JWTHeaderKeyID untyped string = "kid"
  const JWTHeaderType untyped string = "typ"
  const JWTPayloadAudience untyped string = "aud"
  const JWTPayloadExpiresAt untyped string = "exp"
  const JWTPayloadIssuedAt untyped string = "iat"
  const JWTPayloadIssuer untyped string = "iss"
  const JWTPayloadJWTID untyped string = "jti"
  const JWTPayloadNotBefore untyped string = "nbf"
  const JWTPayloadSubject untyped string = "sub"
  const MinHMACKeyBytesHS256 untyped int = 32
  const MinHMACKeyBytesHS384 untyped int = 48
  const MinHMACKeyBytesHS512 untyped int = 64
  func AlgorithmName(idOrAlgorithm string) string
  func CreateJWTToken(payload map[string]any, key []byte) (string, error)
  func CreateJWTTokenWithSigner(payload map[string]any, signer JWTSigner) (string, error)
  func CreateSigner(algorithmID string, key []byte) (JWTSigner, error)
  func CreateSignerStrict(algorithmID string, key []byte) (JWTSigner, error)
  func CreateToken(payload map[string]any, key []byte) (string, error)
  func CreateTokenWithAlgorithm(payload map[string]any, key []byte, algorithm string) (string, error)
  func CreateTokenWithHeaders(headers map[string]any, payload map[string]any, key []byte) (string, error)
  func CreateTokenWithHeadersAndAlgorithm(headers map[string]any, payload map[string]any, key []byte, algorithm string) (string, error)
  func CreateTokenWithHeadersAndSigner(headers map[string]any, payload map[string]any, signer JWTSigner) (string, error)
  func CreateTokenWithOptions(opts ...TokenOption) (string, error)
  func CreateTokenWithSigner(payload map[string]any, signer JWTSigner) (string, error)
  func ES256(priv *crypto/ecdsa.PrivateKey, pub *crypto/ecdsa.PublicKey) JWTSigner
  func ES256WithOptions(priv *crypto/ecdsa.PrivateKey, pub *crypto/ecdsa.PublicKey, opts ...SignerOption) JWTSigner
  func ES384(priv *crypto/ecdsa.PrivateKey, pub *crypto/ecdsa.PublicKey) JWTSigner
  func ES384WithOptions(priv *crypto/ecdsa.PrivateKey, pub *crypto/ecdsa.PublicKey, opts ...SignerOption) JWTSigner
  func ES512(priv *crypto/ecdsa.PrivateKey, pub *crypto/ecdsa.PublicKey) JWTSigner
  func ES512WithOptions(priv *crypto/ecdsa.PrivateKey, pub *crypto/ecdsa.PublicKey, opts ...SignerOption) JWTSigner
  func HS256(key []byte) JWTSigner
  func HS384(key []byte) JWTSigner
  func HS512(key []byte) JWTSigner
  func JWTErrorf(format string, args ...any) *JWTError
  func JWTOf(token string) (*JWT, error)
  func JWTOfWithOptions(token string, opts ...JSONOption) (*JWT, error)
  func JWTSignerECDSA(algorithm string, priv *crypto/ecdsa.PrivateKey, pub *crypto/ecdsa.PublicKey) (JWTSigner, error)
  func JWTSignerES256(priv *crypto/ecdsa.PrivateKey, pub *crypto/ecdsa.PublicKey) JWTSigner
  func JWTSignerHMAC(algorithm string, key []byte) (JWTSigner, error)
  func JWTSignerHS256(key []byte) JWTSigner
  func MinHMACKeyBytes(algorithm string) (int, error)
  func MustHMACSigner(algorithm string, key []byte) JWTSigner
  func New() *JWT
  func NewECDSASigner(algorithm string, priv *crypto/ecdsa.PrivateKey, pub *crypto/ecdsa.PublicKey) (JWTSigner, error)
  func NewECDSASignerWithOptions(algorithm string, priv *crypto/ecdsa.PrivateKey, pub *crypto/ecdsa.PublicKey, opts ...SignerOption) (JWTSigner, error)
  func NewHMACSigner(algorithm string, key []byte) (JWTSigner, error)
  func NewHMACSignerStrict(algorithm string, key []byte) (JWTSigner, error)
  func NewJWT() *JWT
  func NewJWTError(msg string) *JWTError
  func NewRSAPSSSigner(algorithm string, priv *crypto/rsa.PrivateKey, pub *crypto/rsa.PublicKey) (JWTSigner, error)
  func NewRSAPSSSignerWithOptions(algorithm string, priv *crypto/rsa.PrivateKey, pub *crypto/rsa.PublicKey, opts ...SignerOption) (JWTSigner, error)
  func OfValidator(token string) *JWTValidator
  func OfValidatorJWT(j *JWT) *JWTValidator
  func PS256(priv *crypto/rsa.PrivateKey, pub *crypto/rsa.PublicKey) JWTSigner
  func PS256WithOptions(priv *crypto/rsa.PrivateKey, pub *crypto/rsa.PublicKey, opts ...SignerOption) JWTSigner
  func PS384(priv *crypto/rsa.PrivateKey, pub *crypto/rsa.PublicKey) JWTSigner
  func PS384WithOptions(priv *crypto/rsa.PrivateKey, pub *crypto/rsa.PublicKey, opts ...SignerOption) JWTSigner
  func PS512(priv *crypto/rsa.PrivateKey, pub *crypto/rsa.PublicKey) JWTSigner
  func PS512WithOptions(priv *crypto/rsa.PrivateKey, pub *crypto/rsa.PublicKey, opts ...SignerOption) JWTSigner
  func ParseJWT(token string) (*JWT, error)
  func ParseToken(token string) (*JWT, error)
  func ParseTokenWithOptions(token string, opts ...JSONOption) (*JWT, error)
  func ValidateAlgorithm(token string, signer JWTSigner) error
  func ValidateDate(j *JWT, now time.Time, leeway int64) error
  func ValidateJWTDate(j *JWT, now time.Time, leeway int64) error
  func Verify(token string, key []byte) bool
  func VerifyJWT(token string, key []byte) bool
  func VerifyJWTWithSigner(token string, signer JWTSigner) bool
  func VerifyStrict(token string, key []byte) bool
  func VerifyWithSigner(token string, signer JWTSigner) bool
  func WithJSONMarshalFunc(marshal func(any) ([]byte, error)) JSONOption
  func WithJSONUnmarshalFunc(unmarshal func([]byte, any) error) JSONOption
  func WithRSAPSSOptions(opts *crypto/rsa.PSSOptions) SignerOption
  func WithSignerRandomReader(reader io.Reader) SignerOption
  func WithTokenAlgorithm(algorithm string) TokenOption
  func WithTokenHeaders(headers map[string]any) TokenOption
  func WithTokenJSONOptions(opts ...JSONOption) TokenOption
  func WithTokenKey(key []byte) TokenOption
  func WithTokenPayload(payload map[string]any) TokenOption
  func WithTokenSigner(signer JWTSigner) TokenOption
  func WithTokenStrictKey() TokenOption
  func WithValidateClock(clock func() time.Time) ValidateOption
  func WithValidateLeeway(leeway int64) ValidateOption
  func WithValidateTime(now time.Time) ValidateOption
  type JSONOption = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/jwt.JSONOption
  type JWT = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/jwt.JWT
  type JWTError = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/jwt.JWTError
  type JWTSigner = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/jwt.JWTSigner
  type JWTValidator = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/jwt.JWTValidator
  type SignerOption = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/jwt.SignerOption
  type TokenOption = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/jwt.TokenOption
  type ValidateOption = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/jwt.ValidateOption

github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/vlog
  const LogLevelAll LogLevel = 0
  const LogLevelDebug LogLevel = 2
  const LogLevelError LogLevel = 5
  const LogLevelFatal LogLevel = 6
  const LogLevelInfo LogLevel = 3
  const LogLevelOff LogLevel = 7
  const LogLevelTrace LogLevel = 1
  const LogLevelWarn LogLevel = 4
  func Debug(args ...any)
  func DebugWithOptions(opts []LoggerOption, args ...any)
  func Debugf(format string, args ...any)
  func DebugfWithOptions(opts []LoggerOption, format string, args ...any)
  func DefaultLogger() Log
  func DefaultLoggerWithOptions(opts ...LoggerOption) Log
  func ErrorLog(args ...any)
  func ErrorLogWithOptions(opts []LoggerOption, args ...any)
  func Errorf(format string, args ...any)
  func ErrorfWithOptions(opts []LoggerOption, format string, args ...any)
  func Get(name string) Log
  func GetConsoleLevel() Level
  func GetDefault() Log
  func GetDefaultWithOptions(opts ...LoggerOption) Log
  func GetFactory() LogFactory
  func GetLogLevel() LogLevel
  func GetWithOptions(name string, opts ...LoggerOption) Log
  func Info(args ...any)
  func InfoWithOptions(opts []LoggerOption, args ...any)
  func Infof(format string, args ...any)
  func InfofWithOptions(opts []LoggerOption, format string, args ...any)
  func LogAt(level LogLevel, format string, args ...any)
  func LogAtE(level LogLevel, err error, format string, args ...any)
  func LogAtEWithOptions(opts []LoggerOption, level LogLevel, err error, format string, args ...any)
  func LogAtWithOptions(opts []LoggerOption, level LogLevel, format string, args ...any)
  func Logger(name string) Log
  func LoggerWithOptions(name string, opts ...LoggerOption) Log
  func NewConsoleColorLog(name string) *ConsoleColorLog
  func NewConsoleColorLogWithOptions(name string, opts ...ConsoleLogOption) *ConsoleColorLog

  func NewConsoleLogWithOptions(name string, opts ...ConsoleLogOption) *ConsoleLog

  func SetConsoleLevel(level Level)
  func SetFactory(factory LogFactory)
  func SetLogColorFactory(f ColorFactory)
  func SetLogFactory(factory LogFactory)
  func SetLogLevel(level LogLevel)
  func Trace(args ...any)
  func TraceWithOptions(opts []LoggerOption, args ...any)
  func Tracef(format string, args ...any)
  func TracefWithOptions(opts []LoggerOption, format string, args ...any)
  func Warn(args ...any)
  func WarnWithOptions(opts []LoggerOption, args ...any)
  func Warnf(format string, args ...any)
  func WarnfWithOptions(opts []LoggerOption, format string, args ...any)
  func WithLogClock(clock func() time.Time) ConsoleLogOption

  func WithLogOutput(out io.Writer, errOut io.Writer) ConsoleLogOption
  func WithLogTimeLayout(layout string) ConsoleLogOption

  func WithLoggerConsoleOptions(opts ...ConsoleLogOption) LoggerOption
  func WithLoggerFactory(factory LogFactory) LoggerOption
  type AbstractLog = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/log.AbstractLog
  type ColorFactory = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/log.ColorFactory

github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/vmail
  const CharsetASCII Charset = "US-ASCII"
  const CharsetUTF8 Charset = "UTF-8"
  const Encoding7Bit Encoding = "7bit"
  const Encoding8Bit Encoding = "8bit"
  const EncodingBase64 Encoding = "base64"
  const EncodingQuotedPrintable Encoding = "quoted-printable"
  const TLSImplicit TLSPolicy = 2
  const TLSMandatoryStartTLS TLSPolicy = 1
  const TLSNone TLSPolicy = 4
  const TLSOpportunisticStartTLS TLSPolicy = 3
  const TLSPolicyUnknown TLSPolicy = 0
  const TypeApplicationOctetStream ContentType = "application/octet-stream"
  const TypeTextHTML ContentType = "text/html"
  const TypeTextPlain ContentType = "text/plain"
  func NewAddress(name string, email string) (*Address, error)
  func NewAttachment(name string, content []byte, contentType ContentType) (Attachment, error)
  func NewAttachmentFile(path string) (Attachment, error)
  func NewAttachmentReader(name string, size int64, contentType ContentType, open func() (io.ReadCloser, error)) (Attachment, error)
  func NewClient(host string, port int, opts ...ClientOption) (*Client, error)
  func NewInline(name string, contentID string, content []byte, contentType ContentType) (Attachment, error)
  func NewInlineFile(path string, contentID string) (Attachment, error)
  func NewInlineReader(name string, contentID string, size int64, contentType ContentType, open func() (io.ReadCloser, error)) (Attachment, error)
  func NewMessage(opts ...MessageOption) (*Message, error)
  func ParseAddress(value string) (*Address, error)
  func ParseAddressList(value string) ([]*Address, error)
  func QuickSend(ctx context.Context, account Account, opts ...QuickOption) error
  func Send(ctx context.Context, host string, port int, message *Message, opts ...ClientOption) error
  func SendAccountHTML(ctx context.Context, account Account, to []string, subject string, html string, opts ...QuickOption) error
  func SendAccountText(ctx context.Context, account Account, to []string, subject string, text string, opts ...QuickOption) error
  func SendHTML(ctx context.Context, host string, port int, from string, to []string, subject string, html string, opts ...ClientOption) error
  func SendText(ctx context.Context, host string, port int, from string, to []string, subject string, text string, opts ...ClientOption) error
  func WithAllowPlainAuth(allow bool) ClientOption
  func WithAttachment(name string, content []byte, contentType ContentType) MessageOption
  func WithAttachmentFile(path string) MessageOption
  func WithAttachmentReader(name string, size int64, contentType ContentType, open func() (io.ReadCloser, error)) MessageOption
  func WithAuth(username string, password string) ClientOption
  func WithBcc(addresses ...string) MessageOption
  func WithBoundaryGenerator(generator BoundaryGenerator) MessageOption
  func WithCc(addresses ...string) MessageOption
  func WithCharset(charset Charset) MessageOption
  func WithDate(t time.Time) MessageOption
  func WithDialContext(dial func(context.Context, string, string) (net.Conn, error)) ClientOption
  func WithEncoding(encoding Encoding) MessageOption
  func WithEnvelopeFrom(address string) MessageOption
  func WithFrom(address string) MessageOption
  func WithFromAddress(addr *Address) MessageOption
  func WithHTML(html string) MessageOption
  func WithHeader(name string, values ...string) MessageOption
  func WithInline(name string, contentID string, content []byte, contentType ContentType) MessageOption
  func WithInlineFile(path string, contentID string) MessageOption
  func WithInlineReader(name string, contentID string, size int64, contentType ContentType, open func() (io.ReadCloser, error)) MessageOption
  func WithLocalName(name string) ClientOption
  func WithMaxAttachmentBytes(maxBytes int64) MessageOption
  func WithMessageID(id string) MessageOption
  func WithQuickClientOptions(opts ...ClientOption) QuickOption
  func WithQuickMessageOptions(opts ...MessageOption) QuickOption
  func WithReplyTo(addresses ...string) MessageOption
  func WithSMTPAuth(auth net/smtp.Auth) ClientOption
  func WithSenderProvider(provider SenderProvider) ClientOption
  func WithSubject(subject string) MessageOption
  func WithTLSConfig(config *crypto/tls.Config) ClientOption
  func WithTLSPolicy(policy TLSPolicy) ClientOption
  func WithText(text string) MessageOption
  func WithTimeout(timeout time.Duration) ClientOption
  func WithTo(addresses ...string) MessageOption
  type Account = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/mail.Account
  type Address = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/mail.Address
  type Attachment = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/mail.Attachment
  type BoundaryGenerator = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/mail.BoundaryGenerator
  type Charset = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/mail.Charset
  type Client = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/mail.Client
  type ClientOption = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/mail.ClientOption
  type Config = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/mail.Config
  type ContentType = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/mail.ContentType
  type DialContextFunc = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/mail.DialContextFunc
  type Encoding = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/mail.Encoding
  type Header = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/mail.Header
  type Message = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/mail.Message
  type MessageOption = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/mail.MessageOption
  type QuickOption = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/mail.QuickOption
  type SendCloser = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/mail.SendCloser
  type Sender = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/mail.Sender
  type SenderFunc = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/mail.SenderFunc
  type SenderProvider = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/mail.SenderProvider
  type TLSPolicy = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/mail.TLSPolicy
  var ErrAttachmentTooLarge error
  var ErrInvalidAddress error
  var ErrInvalidHeader error
  var ErrMissingBody error
  var ErrMissingFrom error
  var ErrMissingRecipient error
  var ErrPlainAuth error
  var ErrTLSRequired error

github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/vmap
  func Assign[K comparable, V any](maps ...map[K]V) map[K]V
  func Clear[K comparable, V any](m map[K]V)
  func Clone[K comparable, V any](m map[K]V) map[K]V
  func ContainsKey[K comparable, V any](m map[K]V, key K) bool
  func ContainsValue[K comparable, V comparable](m map[K]V, value V) bool
  func CountBy[T any, K comparable](items []T, keyFn func(T) K) map[K]int
  func Diff[K comparable, V any](a map[K]V, others ...map[K]V) map[K]V
  func Entries[K comparable, V any](m map[K]V) []Pair[K, V]
  func EqualFunc[K comparable, V1 any, V2 any](a map[K]V1, b map[K]V2, eq func(V1, V2) bool) bool
  func Equal[K comparable, V comparable](a map[K]V, b map[K]V) bool
  func Every[K comparable, V any](m map[K]V, pred func(K, V) bool) bool
  func FilterKeys[K comparable, V any](m map[K]V, pred func(K) bool) map[K]V
  func FilterValues[K comparable, V any](m map[K]V, pred func(V) bool) map[K]V
  func Filter[K comparable, V any](m map[K]V, pred func(K, V) bool) map[K]V
  func FindKey[K comparable, V any](m map[K]V, pred func(V) bool) (K, bool)
  func Find[K comparable, V any](m map[K]V, pred func(K, V) bool) (K, V, bool)
  func ForEach[K comparable, V any](m map[K]V, fn func(K, V))
  func FromEntries[K comparable, V any](entries []Pair[K, V]) map[K]V
  func FromPairs[K comparable, V any](pairs ...Pair[K, V]) map[K]V
  func GetAny[K comparable, V any](m map[K]V, keys ...K) (V, bool)
  func GetOr[K comparable, V any](m map[K]V, key K, fallback V) V
  func Get[K comparable, V any](m map[K]V, key K) V
  func GroupBy[T any, K comparable](items []T, keyFn func(T) K) map[K][]T
  func Intersect[K comparable, V any](maps ...map[K]V) map[K]V
  func Inverse[K comparable, V comparable](m map[K]V) map[V]K
  func Invert[K comparable, V comparable](m map[K]V) map[V]K
  func IsEmpty[K comparable, V any](m map[K]V) bool
  func IsNotEmpty[K comparable, V any](m map[K]V) bool
  func IterKeys[K comparable, V any](m map[K]V) iter.Seq[K]
  func IterValues[K comparable, V any](m map[K]V) iter.Seq[V]
  func Iter[K comparable, V any](m map[K]V) iter.Seq2[K, V]
  func KeysOf[K comparable, V comparable](m map[K]V, target V) []K
  func Keys[K comparable, V any](m map[K]V) []K
  func MapKeys[K1 comparable, K2 comparable, V any](m map[K1]V, transform func(K1, V) K2) map[K2]V
  func MapValues[K comparable, V1 any, V2 any](m map[K]V1, transform func(K, V1) V2) map[K]V2
  func Map[K1 comparable, K2 comparable, V1 any, V2 any](m map[K1]V1, transform func(K1, V1) (K2, V2)) map[K2]V2
  func MergeFunc[K comparable, V any](resolve func(old V, new V) V, maps ...map[K]V) map[K]V
  func MergeWithOverwrite[K comparable, V any](dstMap map[K]V, srcMaps ...map[K]V)
  func MergeWithoutOverwrite[K comparable, V any](dstMap map[K]V, srcMaps ...map[K]V)
  func Merge[K comparable, V any](maps ...map[K]V) map[K]V
  func NewWithCap[K comparable, V any](hint int) map[K]V
  func New[K comparable, V any]() map[K]V
  func OfE[K comparable, V any](kvs ...any) (map[K]V, error)
  func Of[K comparable, V any](kvs ...any) map[K]V
  func OmitBy[K comparable, V any](m map[K]V, pred func(K, V) bool) map[K]V
  func Omit[K comparable, V any](m map[K]V, keys ...K) map[K]V
  func OrEmpty[K comparable, V any](m map[K]V) map[K]V
  func Partition[K comparable, V any](m map[K]V, pred func(K, V) bool) (map[K]V, map[K]V)
  func PickBy[K comparable, V any](m map[K]V, pred func(K, V) bool) map[K]V
  func Pick[K comparable, V any](m map[K]V, keys ...K) map[K]V
  func Reduce[K comparable, V any, R any](m map[K]V, initial R, fn func(R, K, V) R) R
  func Reject[K comparable, V any](m map[K]V, pred func(K, V) bool) map[K]V
  func Some[K comparable, V any](m map[K]V, pred func(K, V) bool) bool
  func SortedKeysFunc[K comparable, V any](m map[K]V, less func(a K, b K) bool) []K
  func SortedKeys[K cmp.Ordered, V any](m map[K]V) []K
  func SortedValues[K cmp.Ordered, V any](m map[K]V) []V
  func SymmetricDiff[K comparable, V any](a map[K]V, b map[K]V) map[K]V
  func ToSlice[K comparable, V any, R any](m map[K]V, transform func(K, V) R) []R
  func Update[K comparable, V any](dst map[K]V, src map[K]V) map[K]V
  func Values[K comparable, V any](m map[K]V) []V
  type Pair[K comparable, V any] = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/maps.Pair[K, V]

github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/vmask
  const AddressType Type = 5
  const BankCardType Type = 9
  const CarLicenseType Type = 8
  const ChineseNameType Type = 1
  const ClearToEmptyType Type = 16
  const ClearToNullType Type = 15
  const CreditCodeType Type = 13
  const EmailType Type = 6
  const FirstMaskType Type = 14
  const FixedPhoneType Type = 3
  const IDCard Type = 2
  const IPv4Type Type = 10
  const IPv6Type Type = 11
  const MobilePhoneType Type = 4
  const PassportType Type = 12
  const PasswordType Type = 7
  const UserID Type = 0
  func Address(address string, sensitiveSize int) string
  func BankCard(bankCardNo string) string
  func CarLicense(carLicense string) string
  func ChineseName(fullName string) string
  func Clear() string
  func ClearToNil() *string
  func CreditCode(code string) string
  func Email(email string) string
  func FirstMask(str string) string
  func FixedPhone(num string) string
  func Hide(str string, start int, end int) string
  func IDCardNum(idCardNum string, front int, end int) string
  func IPv4(ipv4 string) string
  func IPv6(ipv6 string) string
  func Masked(str string, typ Type) string
  func MaskedPtr(str string, typ Type) *string
  func MobilePhone(num string) string
  func Passport(passport string) string
  func Password(password string) string
  func UserIDValue() int64
  type Type = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/mask.Type

  const PortRangeMax untyped int = 65535
  const PortRangeMin untyped int = 1024

  type AddressOption = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/net.AddressOption
  type ConnectOption = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/net.ConnectOption
  type Dialer = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/net.Dialer
  type IPOption = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/net.IPOption
  type InterfaceOption = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/net.InterfaceOption
  type LocalPortGenerator = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/net.LocalPortGenerator
  type MultipartFormData = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/net.MultipartFormData
  type OpenUploadedFileFunc = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/net.OpenUploadedFileFunc
  type PingOption = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/net.PingOption
  type PortOption = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/net.PortOption
  type ResolveOption = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/net.ResolveOption
  type TLSConfigBuilder = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/net.TLSConfigBuilder
  type TLSFileOption = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/net.TLSFileOption
  type UploadSaveOption = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/net.UploadSaveOption
  type UploadSetting = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/net.UploadSetting
  type WildcardOption = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/net.WildcardOption

  const RoundHalfEven github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/num.RoundingMode = 1
  const RoundHalfUp github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/num.RoundingMode = 0

  func AbsInteger[T integer](v T) T

  func GetBinaryStrWithOptions(number any, opts ...FormatOption) string

  func IsDoubleWithOptions(s string, opts ...ParseOption) bool

  func IsIntegerWithOptions(s string, opts ...ParseOption) bool

  func IsLess[T Ordered](a T, b T) bool

  func IsLongWithOptions(s string, opts ...ParseOption) bool

  func IsNumberWithOptions(s string, opts ...ParseOption) bool
  func IsOdd(num int) bool
  func IsPowerOfTwo(n int64) bool
  func IsPrimes(n int) bool

  func IsValidFloat32(number float32) bool

  func MaxFloat64s(values ...float64) float64

  func MinFloat64s(values ...float64) float64
  func MinInteger[T integer](a T, b T) T
  func MinIntegers[T integer](values ...T) T
  func Min[T Ordered](nums ...T) T
  func Mul(values ...float64) float64
  func MulStr(values ...string) *math/big.Rat
  func Multiple(m int, n int) int
  func NewBigInteger(str string) (*math/big.Int, bool)
  func Null2Zero(decimal *math/big.Rat) *math/big.Rat
  func NullBigDecimalToZero(number *math/big.Rat) *math/big.Rat
  func NullBigIntToZero(number *math/big.Int) *math/big.Int
  func NullToZero[T Number](number *T) T
  func ParseDouble(number string) float64
  func ParseDoubleDefault(numberStr string, defaultValue float64) float64
  func ParseDoubleDefaultWithOptions(numberStr string, defaultValue float64, opts ...ParseOption) float64
  func ParseDoubleWithOptions(number string, opts ...ParseOption) float64
  func ParseFloat(number string) float32
  func ParseFloatDefault(numberStr string, defaultValue float32) float32
  func ParseFloatDefaultWithOptions(numberStr string, defaultValue float32, opts ...ParseOption) float32
  func ParseFloatWithOptions(number string, opts ...ParseOption) float32
  func ParseInt(number string) int
  func ParseIntDefault(numberStr string, defaultValue int) int
  func ParseIntDefaultWithOptions(numberStr string, defaultValue int, opts ...ParseOption) int
  func ParseIntWithOptions(number string, opts ...ParseOption) int
  func ParseLong(number string) int64
  func ParseLongDefault(numberStr string, defaultValue int64) int64
  func ParseLongDefaultWithOptions(numberStr string, defaultValue int64, opts ...ParseOption) int64
  func ParseLongWithOptions(number string, opts ...ParseOption) int64
  func ParseNumber(numberStr string) (float64, error)
  func ParseNumberWithOptions(numberStr string, opts ...ParseOption) (float64, error)
  func PartValue(total int, partCount int) int
  func PartValueWithMode(total int, partCount int, plusOneWhenHasRem bool) int
  func Pow(number float64, n int) float64
  func PowWithMode(number float64, n int, scale int, mode RoundingMode) float64
  func ProcessMultiple(selectNum int, minNum int) int
  func Range(start int, end int, step int) []int
  func RangeClosed(start int, stop int, step int) []int
  func Round(v float64, scale int) float64
  func RoundDownFloat(v float64, scale int) float64
  func RoundHalfEvenFloat(v float64, scale int) float64
  func RoundMode(v float64, scale int, mode RoundingMode) float64
  func RoundStr(v float64, scale int) string
  func RoundStrWithOptions(v float64, scale int, opts ...FormatOption) string
  func Sqrt(x uint64) uint64
  func Sub(values ...float64) float64
  func SubStr(values ...string) *math/big.Rat
  func SumNumber[T number](values ...T) float64
  func Sum[T Number](nums ...T) T
  func ToBigDecimal(numberStr string) *math/big.Rat
  func ToBigDecimalWithOptions(numberStr string, opts ...ParseOption) *math/big.Rat
  func ToBigInteger(number string) *math/big.Int
  func ToBytes(value int32) []byte
  func ToDouble(value any) float64
  func ToDoubleWithOptions(value any, opts ...DoubleOption) float64
  func ToInt(bytes []byte) int32
  func ToStr(number float64) string
  func ToStrDefault(number *float64, defaultValue string) string
  func ToStrDefaultWithOptions(number *float64, defaultValue string, opts ...FormatOption) string
  func ToStrStrip(number float64, stripTrailingZeros bool) string
  func ToStrStripWithOptions(number float64, stripTrailingZeros bool, opts ...FormatOption) string
  func ToStrWithOptions(number float64, opts ...FormatOption) string
  func ToUnsignedByteArray(value *math/big.Int) []byte
  func ToUnsignedByteArrayLen(length int, value *math/big.Int) ([]byte, error)
  func WithDoubleFormatFloatFunc(formatter func(float64, byte, int, int) string) DoubleOption
  func WithDoubleParseFloatFunc(parser func(string, int) (float64, error)) DoubleOption
  func WithFormatFloatFunc(formatter func(float64, byte, int, int) string) FormatOption
  func WithFormatIntFunc(formatter func(int64, int) string) FormatOption
  func WithParseFloatFunc(parser func(string, int) (float64, error)) ParseOption
  func WithParseIntFunc(parser func(string, int, int) (int64, error)) ParseOption
  func WithRandomReader(reader io.Reader) RandomNumberOption
  func Zero2One(value int) int
  type DoubleOption = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/num.DoubleOption
  type FormatOption = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/num.FormatOption
  type Number = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/num.Number
  type Ordered = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/num.Ordered
  type ParseOption = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/num.ParseOption
  type RandomNumberOption = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/num.RandomNumberOption
  type RoundingMode = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/num.RoundingMode

  func Accept[T any](source *T, consumer func(T))
  func Apply[T any, R any](source *T, handle func(T) R) R
  func CloneByStreamWithOptions[T any](src T, opts ...CodecOption) (T, error)
  func CloneByStream[T any](src T) (T, error)
  func CloneIfPossibleWithOptions[T any](src T, opts ...CodecOption) T
  func CloneIfPossible[T any](src T) T
  func CloneWithOptions[T any](src T, opts ...CodecOption) (T, error)
  func Clone[T any](src T) (T, error)
  func CompareNull[T Ordered](a *T, b *T, nilGreater bool) int
  func Compare[T Ordered](a *T, b *T) int
  func Contains(obj any, element any) bool
  func DefaultIfNilApply[T any, R any](source *T, handle func(T) R, defaultValue R) R
  func DefaultIfNilFunc[T any](object *T, supplier func() T) T
  func DefaultIfNil[T any](object *T, defaultValue T) T
  func Deserialize(data []byte, out any, acceptedTypes ...any) error
  func DeserializeToWithOptions[T any](data []byte, acceptedTypes []any, opts ...CodecOption) (T, error)
  func DeserializeTo[T any](data []byte, acceptedTypes ...any) (T, error)
  func DeserializeWithOptions(data []byte, out any, acceptedTypes []any, opts ...CodecOption) error
  func EmptyCount(values ...any) int
  func Equal(a any, b any) bool
  func Equals(a any, b any) bool
  func HasEmpty(values ...any) bool
  func HasNil(values ...any) bool
  func HasNull(values ...any) bool
  func IsAllEmpty(values ...any) bool
  func IsAllNotEmpty(values ...any) bool
  func IsBasicType(object any) bool
  func IsEmpty(v any) bool
  func IsNil(v any) bool
  func IsNotEmpty(v any) bool
  func IsNotNil(v any) bool
  func IsNotNull(v any) bool
  func IsNull(v any) bool
  func IsValidIfNumber(object any) bool
  func Length(v any) int
  func MustDeserialize[T any](data []byte, acceptedTypes ...any) T
  func NotEqual(a any, b any) bool
  func Register(value any)
  func RegisterName(name string, value any)
  func SerializeOrNilWithOptions[T any](obj T, opts ...CodecOption) []byte
  func SerializeOrNil[T any](obj T) []byte

  func Serialize[T any](obj T) ([]byte, error)
  func ToString(object any) string
  func TypeName(object any) string
  func TypeOf(object any) reflect.Type
  func ValidateAcceptedTypes(value any, acceptedTypes ...any) error
  func WithDecoderFactory(factory func(io.Reader) Decoder) CodecOption
  func WithEncoderFactory(factory func(io.Writer) Encoder) CodecOption
  type CodecOption = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/obj.CodecOption
  type Decoder = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/obj.Decoder
  type Encoder = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/obj.Encoder
  type Ordered interface{}

github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/vpass
  const StrengthMedium github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/pass.Strength = 3
  const StrengthStrong github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/pass.Strength = 4
  const StrengthUnknown github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/pass.Strength = 0
  const StrengthVeryStrong github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/pass.Strength = 5
  const StrengthVeryWeak github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/pass.Strength = 1
  const StrengthWeak github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/pass.Strength = 2
  func Analyze(password string) Analysis
  func IsStrong(password string) bool
  func IsWeak(password string) bool
  func Score(password string) int
  func StrengthOf(password string) Strength
  type Analysis = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/pass.Analysis
  type Strength = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/pass.Strength

  func NewInstanceIfPossible(target any) any

  const REChineses untyped string = "^\\p{Han}+$"

  type Option = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/regex.Option

github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/vresty
  const ContentTypeEventStream ContentType = "text/event-stream"
  const ContentTypeFormURLEncoded ContentType = "application/x-www-form-urlencoded"
  const ContentTypeJSON ContentType = "application/json"
  const ContentTypeMultipart ContentType = "multipart/form-data"
  const ContentTypeOctetStream ContentType = "application/octet-stream"
  const ContentTypeTextHTML ContentType = "text/html"
  const ContentTypeTextPlain ContentType = "text/plain"
  const ContentTypeTextXML ContentType = "text/xml"
  const ContentTypeXML ContentType = "application/xml"
  const HeaderAccept Header = "Accept"
  const HeaderAcceptCharset Header = "Accept-Charset"
  const HeaderAcceptEncoding Header = "Accept-Encoding"
  const HeaderAcceptLanguage Header = "Accept-Language"
  const HeaderAuthorization Header = "Authorization"
  const HeaderCacheControl Header = "Cache-Control"
  const HeaderConnection Header = "Connection"
  const HeaderContentDisposition Header = "Content-Disposition"
  const HeaderContentEncoding Header = "Content-Encoding"
  const HeaderContentLength Header = "Content-Length"
  const HeaderContentType Header = "Content-Type"
  const HeaderCookie Header = "Cookie"
  const HeaderDate Header = "Date"
  const HeaderETag Header = "ETag"
  const HeaderHost Header = "Host"
  const HeaderLocation Header = "Location"
  const HeaderMimeVersion Header = "MIME-Version"
  const HeaderOrigin Header = "Origin"
  const HeaderPragma Header = "Pragma"
  const HeaderProxyAuthorization Header = "Proxy-Authorization"
  const HeaderReferer Header = "Referer"
  const HeaderSetCookie Header = "Set-Cookie"
  const HeaderTrailer Header = "Trailer"
  const HeaderTransferEncoding Header = "Transfer-Encoding"
  const HeaderUpgrade Header = "Upgrade"
  const HeaderUserAgent Header = "User-Agent"
  const HeaderVia Header = "Via"
  const HeaderWWWAuthenticate Header = "WWW-Authenticate"
  const MethodConnect Method = "CONNECT"
  const MethodDelete Method = "DELETE"
  const MethodGet Method = "GET"
  const MethodHead Method = "HEAD"
  const MethodOptions Method = "OPTIONS"
  const MethodPatch Method = "PATCH"
  const MethodPost Method = "POST"
  const MethodPut Method = "PUT"
  const MethodTrace Method = "TRACE"
  func AddGlobalHeader(name string, value string)
  func BuildBasicAuth(user string, pass string) string
  func BuildContentType(contentType string, charset string) string
  func CloneGlobalHeaders() HeaderValues
  func CloseCookie()
  func ConfigureDefaultRestyClientProvider(provider func() *resty.dev/v3.Client)
  func ConfigureGlobalConfig(cfg GlobalConfig)
  func Delete(rawURL string, opts ...RequestOption) *Request
  func DeleteSafe(rawURL string, opts ...RequestOption) *Request
  func Download(rawURL string, w io.Writer) (int64, error)
  func DownloadBytesE(rawURL string) ([]byte, error)
  func DownloadBytesEWithOptions(rawURL string, opts ...RequestOption) ([]byte, error)
  func DownloadBytesSafeE(rawURL string, opts ...RequestOption) ([]byte, error)
  func DownloadFile(rawURL string, dest string, opts ...SaveOption) (int64, error)
  func DownloadFileSafe(rawURL string, dest string, opts ...SaveOption) (int64, error)
  func DownloadFileSafeWithOptions(rawURL string, dest string, requestOpts []RequestOption, saveOpts ...SaveOption) (int64, error)
  func DownloadFileWithOptions(rawURL string, dest string, requestOpts []RequestOption, saveOpts ...SaveOption) (int64, error)
  func DownloadSafe(rawURL string, w io.Writer, opts ...RequestOption) (int64, error)
  func DownloadStringE(rawURL string, customCharset string) (string, error)
  func DownloadStringEWithOptions(rawURL string, customCharset string, opts ...RequestOption) (string, error)
  func DownloadStringSafeE(rawURL string, customCharset string, opts ...RequestOption) (string, error)
  func DownloadWithOptions(rawURL string, w io.Writer, opts ...RequestOption) (int64, error)
  func Get(rawURL string, opts ...RequestOption) *Request
  func GetCharsetFromContentType(ct string) string
  func GetCharsetFromContentTypeWithOptions(ct string, opts ...CharsetOption) string
  func GetCharsetFromHTML(html string) string
  func GetCharsetFromHTMLWithOptions(html string, opts ...CharsetOption) string
  func GetGlobalFollowRedirects() bool
  func GetGlobalMaxRedirects() int
  func GetGlobalMaxResponseBytes() int64
  func GetGlobalTimeout() time.Duration
  func GetGlobalUserAgent() string
  func GetMimeType(filename string) string
  func GetSafe(rawURL string, opts ...RequestOption) *Request
  func GetStringE(rawURL string) (string, error)
  func GetStringEWithOptions(rawURL string, opts ...RequestOption) (string, error)
  func GetStringSafeE(rawURL string, opts ...RequestOption) (string, error)
  func GetWithParamsE(rawURL string, params map[string]any) (string, error)
  func GetWithParamsEWithOptions(rawURL string, params map[string]any, opts ...RequestOption) (string, error)
  func GetWithTimeoutE(rawURL string, timeout time.Duration) (string, error)
  func GetWithTimeoutEWithOptions(rawURL string, timeout time.Duration, opts ...RequestOption) (string, error)
  func GuessContentType(body string) ContentType
  func HTTPErrorf(format string, args ...any) *Error
  func Head(rawURL string, opts ...RequestOption) *Request
  func HeadSafe(rawURL string, opts ...RequestOption) *Request
  func IsDefaultContentType(contentType string) bool
  func IsFormURLEncoded(contentType string) bool
  func IsHTTP(rawURL string) bool
  func IsHTTPS(rawURL string) bool
  func NewClient(opts ...ClientOption) *Client
  func NewClientWithConfig(cfg GlobalConfig, opts ...RequestOption) *Client
  func NewHTTPError(msg string, cause error) *Error
  func NewIsolatedClient(opts ...ClientOption) *Client
  func NewIsolatedRequest(method Method, rawURL string, opts ...RequestOption) *Request
  func NewRequest(method Method, rawURL string, opts ...RequestOption) *Request
  func NewRequestWithConfig(method Method, rawURL string, cfg GlobalConfig, opts ...RequestOption) *Request
  func NewSafeRequest(method Method, rawURL string, opts ...RequestOption) *Request
  func Options(rawURL string, opts ...RequestOption) *Request
  func OptionsSafe(rawURL string, opts ...RequestOption) *Request
  func Patch(rawURL string, opts ...RequestOption) *Request
  func PatchSafe(rawURL string, opts ...RequestOption) *Request
  func Post(rawURL string, opts ...RequestOption) *Request

  func PostJSONSafeE(rawURL string, jsonStr string, opts ...RequestOption) (string, error)
  func PostSafe(rawURL string, opts ...RequestOption) *Request

  func PostStringEWithOptions(rawURL string, body string, opts ...RequestOption) (string, error)
  func PostStringSafeE(rawURL string, body string, opts ...RequestOption) (string, error)
  func Put(rawURL string, opts ...RequestOption) *Request
  func PutSafe(rawURL string, opts ...RequestOption) *Request
  func RemoveGlobalHeader(name string)
  func ResetDefaultRestyClientProvider()
  func ResetGlobalConfig()

  func WithJSONUnmarshalFunc(unmarshal func([]byte, any) error) RequestOption

  func WithScopedGlobalConfig(cfg GlobalConfig, fn func())
  func WithTLSConfig(cfg *crypto/tls.Config) RequestOption

  func WithURLPolicy(policy URLPolicy) RequestOption
  func WithUserAgent(ua string) RequestOption
  type CharsetOption = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/httpx/resty.CharsetOption

  type Cookie = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/httpx/resty.Cookie
  type Error = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/httpx/resty.HTTPError

  type HeaderValues = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/httpx/resty.HeaderValues
  type Method = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/httpx/resty.Method

  type RequestOption = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/httpx/resty.RequestOption

  type SaveOption = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/httpx/resty.SaveOption
