github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/vset
  func NewInt(items ...int) Int
  func NewInt32(items ...int32) Int32
  func NewInt64(items ...int64) Int64
  func NewString(items ...string) String
  func NewUint(items ...uint) Uint
  func NewUint32(items ...uint32) Uint32
  func NewUint64(items ...uint64) Uint64
  func New[T comparable](items ...T) Set[T]
  func WithSetMarshalFunc(marshal func(any) ([]byte, error)) JSONOption
  func WithSetUnmarshalFunc(unmarshal func([]byte, any) error) JSONOption
  method (*Set[T]) UnmarshalJSON(data []byte) error
  method (*Set[T]) UnmarshalJSONWithOptions(data []byte, opts ...JSONOption) error
  method (*Set[T]) UnmarshalYAML(unmarshal func(any) error) error
  method (Set[T]) Add(items ...T)
  method (Set[T]) Contains(item T) bool
  method (Set[T]) Equal(other Set[T]) bool
  method (Set[T]) Intersect(other Set[T]) Set[T]
  method (Set[T]) MarshalJSON() ([]byte, error)
  method (Set[T]) MarshalJSONWithOptions(opts ...JSONOption) ([]byte, error)
  method (Set[T]) MarshalYAML() (any, error)
  method (Set[T]) Members() []T
  method (Set[T]) Remove(items ...T)
  method (Set[T]) String() string
  method (Set[T]) Sub(other Set[T]) Set[T]
  method (Set[T]) Union(other Set[T]) Set[T]
  type Int = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/sets.Int
  type Int32 = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/sets.Int32
  type Int64 = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/sets.Int64
  type JSONOption = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/sets.JSONOption
  type Set[T comparable] map[T]struct{}
  type String = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/sets.String
  type Uint = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/sets.Uint
  type Uint32 = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/sets.Uint32
  type Uint64 = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/sets.Uint64

  const OpAccept Operation = 8
  const OpConnect Operation = 4
  const OpRead Operation = 1
  const OpWrite Operation = 2
  const SocketDefaultBufferSize untyped int = 8192

  func ChannelDialWithOptions(addr *net.TCPAddr, opts ...ConnectOption) (net.Conn, error)

  func NewAioClient(addr *net.TCPAddr, action IoAction[*bytes.Buffer]) (*AioClient, error)

  func NewNioServerAddrWithOptions(addr *net.TCPAddr, cfg *SocketConfig, opts ...ConfigOption) (*NioServer, error)

  func NewNioServerWithOptions(port int, opts ...ConfigOption) (*NioServer, error)

  method (FuncDecoder[T]) Decode(session *AioSession, readBuffer *bytes.Buffer) (T, bool)
  method (FuncEncoder[T]) Encode(session *AioSession, writeBuffer *bytes.Buffer, data T)
  method (github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/socket.IoAction[T]) Accept(session *github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/socket.AioSession)
  method (github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/socket.IoAction[T]) DoAction(session *github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/socket.AioSession, data T)
  method (github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/socket.IoAction[T]) Failed(err error, session *github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/socket.AioSession)
  method (github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/socket.MsgDecoder[T]) Decode(session *github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/socket.AioSession, readBuffer *bytes.Buffer) (T, bool)
  method (github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/socket.MsgDecoder[T]) Decode(session *github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/socket.AioSession, readBuffer *bytes.Buffer) (T, bool)
  method (github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/socket.MsgEncoder[T]) Encode(session *github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/socket.AioSession, writeBuffer *bytes.Buffer, data T)
  method (github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/socket.MsgEncoder[T]) Encode(session *github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/socket.AioSession, writeBuffer *bytes.Buffer, data T)
  type AioClient = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/socket.AioClient
  type AioServer = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/socket.AioServer
  type AioSession = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/socket.AioSession
  type ChannelHandler = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/socket.ChannelHandler
  type ChannelHandlerFunc = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/socket.ChannelHandlerFunc
  type ConfigOption = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/socket.ConfigOption
  type ConnectOption = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/socket.ConnectOption
  type Dialer = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/net.Dialer
  type FuncDecoder[T any] func(session *AioSession, readBuffer *bytes.Buffer) (T, bool)
  type FuncEncoder[T any] func(session *AioSession, writeBuffer *bytes.Buffer, data T)
  type IoAction[T any] interface{ Accept(session *github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/socket.AioSession); DoAction(session *github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/socket.AioSession, data T); Failed(err error, session *github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/socket.AioSession) }
  type MsgDecoder[T any] interface{ Decode(session *github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/socket.AioSession, readBuffer *bytes.Buffer) (T, bool) }
  type MsgEncoder[T any] interface{ Encode(session *github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/socket.AioSession, writeBuffer *bytes.Buffer, data T) }
  type NioClient = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/socket.NioClient
  type NioServer = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/socket.NioServer
  type Operation = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/socket.Operation
  type Protocol[T any] interface{ Decode(session *github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/socket.AioSession, readBuffer *bytes.Buffer) (T, bool); Encode(session *github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/socket.AioSession, writeBuffer *bytes.Buffer, data T) }
  type SimpleIoAction = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/socket.SimpleIoAction
  type SocketConfig = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/socket.SocketConfig
  type SocketRuntimeError = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/socket.SocketRuntimeError

github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/vslice
  func Associate[T any, K comparable, V any](a []T, transform func(T) (K, V)) map[K]V
  func Chunk[T any](a []T, size int) [][]T
  func Compact[T comparable](a []T) []T
  func Concat[T any](slices ...[]T) []T
  func Contains[T comparable](a []T, v T) bool
  func CountBy[T any, K comparable](a []T, keyFn func(T) K) map[K]int
  func Distinct[T comparable](a []T) []T
  func FilterMap[T any, R any](a []T, fn func(T) (R, bool)) []R
  func Filter[T any](a []T, pred func(T) bool) []T
  func FindIndex[T any](a []T, pred func(T) bool) int
  func Find[T any](a []T, pred func(T) bool) (T, bool)
  func FlatMap[T any, R any](a []T, fn func(T) []R) []R
  func Flatten[T any](a [][]T) []T
  func ForEach[T any](a []T, fn func(T))
  func GroupBy[T any, K comparable](a []T, keyFn func(T) K) map[K][]T
  func IndexOf[T comparable](a []T, v T) int
  func Intersection[T comparable](a []T, b []T) []T
  func IsEmpty[T any](a []T) bool
  func IsNotEmpty[T any](a []T) bool
  func IterIndexed[T any](a []T) iter.Seq2[int, T]
  func Iter[T any](a []T) iter.Seq[T]
  func Join[T any](a []T, sep string) string
  func KeyBy[T any, K comparable](a []T, keyFn func(T) K) map[K]T
  func LastIndexOf[T comparable](a []T, v T) int
  func Map[T any, R any](a []T, fn func(T) R) []R
  func Page[T any](a []T, pageNo int, pageSize int) []T
  func PartitionBy[T any, K comparable](a []T, keyFn func(T) K) [][]T
  func Reduce[T any, R any](a []T, initial R, fn func(R, T) R) R
  func Reject[T any](a []T, pred func(T) bool) []T
  func Reverse[T any](a []T) []T
  func SliceToMap[T any, K comparable, V any](a []T, transform func(T) (K, V)) map[K]V
  func Sub[T any](a []T, fromIndex int, toIndex int) []T
  func Subtract[T comparable](a []T, b []T) []T
  func Union[T comparable](a []T, b []T) []T
  func UniqBy[T any, K comparable](a []T, keyFn func(T) K) []T
  func Uniq[T comparable](a []T) []T

  func AddSuffixIfNot(s string, suffix string) string

  func DefaultIfEmpty(s string, def string) string

  func EqualsIgnoreCase(a string, b string) bool

  func EscapeUnicode(s string) string

  func RemoveSuffix(s string, suffix string) string

  func RuneLen(s string) int

  func SubBefore(s string, sep string, isLastSeparator bool) string

  func ToUnderlineCase(s string) string

  func UnescapeUnicode(s string) string

  func GetMaxMemoryWithOptions(opts ...RuntimeInfoOption) uint64
  func GetOrDefault(key string, def string) string
  func GetOrDefaultWithOptions(key string, def string, opts ...EnvOption) string
  func GetOsInfo() *OsInfo
  func GetOsInfoWithOptions(opts ...OsInfoOption) *OsInfo
  func GetRuntimeInfo() *RuntimeInfo
  func GetRuntimeInfoWithOptions(opts ...RuntimeInfoOption) *RuntimeInfo
  func GetTotalMemory() uint64
  func GetTotalMemoryWithOptions(opts ...RuntimeInfoOption) uint64
  func GetTotalThreadCount() int
  func GetTotalThreadCountWithOptions(opts ...ProcessOption) int
  func GetUserInfo() *UserInfo
  func GetUserInfoWithOptions(opts ...UserInfoOption) *UserInfo
  func GetWithOptions(key string, quiet bool, opts ...EnvOption) string
  func MaxMemory() uint64
  func MaxMemoryWithOptions(opts ...RuntimeInfoOption) uint64
  func NewGoInfo() *GoInfo
  func NewGoInfoWithOptions(opts ...GoInfoOption) *GoInfo
  func NewHostInfo() *HostInfo
  func NewHostInfoWithOptions(opts ...HostInfoOption) *HostInfo

  func NewRuntimeInfoWithOptions(opts ...RuntimeInfoOption) *RuntimeInfo

  func ResetInfoCache()

  func TotalGoroutineCountWithOptions(opts ...ProcessOption) int
  func TotalMemory() uint64
  func TotalMemoryWithOptions(opts ...RuntimeInfoOption) uint64
  func WithCurrentUserFunc(fn func() (*os/user.User, error)) UserInfoOption
  func WithDumpGoOptions(opts ...GoInfoOption) DumpOption
  func WithDumpHostOptions(opts ...HostInfoOption) DumpOption
  func WithDumpOsOptions(opts ...OsInfoOption) DumpOption
  func WithDumpRuntimeOptions(opts ...RuntimeInfoOption) DumpOption

  func WithTempDirFunc(fn func() string) UserInfoOption

  func WithWorkingDirFunc(fn func() (string, error)) UserInfoOption
  type DumpOption = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/system.DumpOption
  type EnvOption = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/system.EnvOption
  type GoInfo = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/system.GoInfo

  const DefaultMaxBytes int64 = 67108864
  const FileURLPrefix untyped string = "file:"
  const JarURLPrefix untyped string = "jar:"
  const JarURLSeparator untyped string = "!/"
  const URLProtocolFile untyped string = "file"
  const URLProtocolJar untyped string = "jar"
  const URLProtocolVFS untyped string = "vfs"
  const URLProtocolVFSFile untyped string = "vfsfile"
  const URLProtocolVFSZip untyped string = "vfszip"
  const URLProtocolWSJar untyped string = "wsjar"
  const URLProtocolZip untyped string = "zip"
  const WarURLPrefix untyped string = "war:"
  const WarURLSeparator untyped string = "*/"

  func ZlibFile(path string, level int) ([]byte, error)
  func ZlibFileWithOptions(path string, level int, opts ...ArchiveOption) ([]byte, error)

  func ZlibLevelWithOptions(data []byte, level int, opts ...ArchiveOption) ([]byte, error)
  func ZlibReader(r io.Reader, level int, estimatedLength int) ([]byte, error)
  func ZlibReaderWithOptions(r io.Reader, level int, estimatedLength int, opts ...ArchiveOption) ([]byte, error)
  func ZlibString(content string, level int) ([]byte, error)
  type ArchiveOption = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/zip.ArchiveOption
  type CreateTempFunc = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/zip.CreateTempFunc
  type Entry = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/zip.Entry
  type EntryData = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/zip.EntryData
  type Error = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/zip.ZipError
  type EvalSymlinksFunc = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/zip.EvalSymlinksFunc
  type FileFilter = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/zip.FileFilter
  type LstatFunc = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/zip.LstatFunc
  type MkdirAllFunc = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/zip.MkdirAllFunc
  type OpenFileFunc = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/zip.OpenFileFunc
  type OpenFunc = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/zip.OpenFunc
  type OpenZipReaderFunc = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/zip.OpenZipReaderFunc
  type ReadDirFunc = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/zip.ReadDirFunc
  type ReadFileFunc = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/zip.ReadFileFunc
  type Reader = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/zip.Reader
  type ReadlinkFunc = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/zip.ReadlinkFunc
  type RemoveFunc = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/zip.RemoveFunc
  type RenameFunc = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/zip.RenameFunc
  type StatFunc = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/zip.StatFunc
  type StreamEntry = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/zip.StreamEntry
  type TempFile = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/zip.TempFile
  type Writer = github.com/imajinyun/go-knifer/internal/zip.Writer
